title: Plan download progress HUD and smooth transfer spinner
description:
Plan PDF downloads and uploads now show a reliable progress HUD: top-center bubble, inline bar above the explorer, and a strip in fullscreen PDF workspaces. The spinner no longer restarts on every sheet — it loops smoothly until the job finishes.

Downloads are faster with batch read-url presign and parallel sheet fetch/burn. Who is affected: PipeSync Plan view on pipeshare.live and private OVH. Hard refresh after deploy (cache hl46).
changeLog: Plan download progress visible in overlay, Plan view panel, and fullscreen workspace.
Upload/download spinner runs continuously without resetting each sheet.
Stable progress DOM — text and bar patch in place, no spinner rebuild per tick.
Batch read-url prefetch and parallel sheet processing for faster exports.
Portal/support spinner CSS aligned with PipeSync progress spin animation.
